# Harm by Stakeholder

| Stakeholder | Harm |
|---|---|
| Consumers | Misled by fake proof, hidden incentives, dark patterns, or fake reviews |
| Creators | Crowded out by copycats, clipping farms, impersonators, and unoriginal content |
| Businesses | Waste money on fake leads, invalid traffic, fraudulent affiliates, fake influencers |
| Investors | Misread inflated or undefined traction metrics |
| Platforms | Recommendation and ranking systems learn from corrupted signals |
| Regulators | Hidden coordination and cross-platform campaigns are hard to attribute |
| Workers | Hidden labor makes “organic” success appear individual and effortless |
| Competitors | Honest actors compete against fabricated social proof and artificial reach |
| Audiences | Cultural trust collapses because everything appears possibly staged |
